summary: This document details the technical architecture for automating Data Sharing Agreement generation using Google Cloud APIs during NHS pilot implementations. It outlines the workflow, including Python and TypeScript code snippets, API functions, and security compliance measures for GDPR and NHS data protection standards. The guide covers environment setup, dependencies, error handling, and audit logging requirements for the engineering team.
